archimate:WorkPackage.name: Work Package 4 - Omnichannel CRM & Customer Service Integration
archimate:WorkPackage.documentation:
Cakupan: Implementasi platform CRM terpadu, integrasi call center, AI chatbot, dan sistem tiket terpusat.
Durasi: 3 bulan (TW3-TW5)
Prioritas: Sedang
Target Plateau: Target Architecture
Menghasilkan: D4 - Omnichannel CRM Platform
Memicu: Omnichannel CRM Live
Menyelesaikan: GAP-5
